suppress.notes: spring-security-core-6.5.9.jar: CVE-2018-1258 only applies when used with spring-framework 5.0.5, which is not in this project. Added: 2026-04-17

spring-security-crypto-6.5.9.jar: CVE-2018-1258 only applies when used with spring-framework 5.0.5, which is not in this project. The NVD CPE cpe:/a:pivotal_software:spring_security matches all spring-security artifacts including crypto, but the vulnerability is context-specific to framework 5.0.5. Added: 2026-04-20

spring-security-crypto-6.5.10.jar: CVE-2018-1258 only applies when used with spring-framework 5.0.5, which is not in this project. The NVD CPE cpe:/a:pivotal_software:spring_security matches all spring-security artifacts including crypto, but the vulnerability is context-specific to framework 5.0.5. Added: 2026-04-20
spring-security-core-6.5.10.jar: CVE-2018-1258 only applies when used with spring-framework 5.0.5, which is not in this project. Added: 2026-04-20
spring-security-core-6.5.11.jar: CVE-2018-1258 only applies when used with spring-framework 5.0.5, which is not in this project. Added: 2026-06-11
spring-security-crypto-6.5.11.jar: CVE-2018-1258 only applies when used with spring-framework 5.0.5, which is not in this project. Added: 2026-06-11

protobuf-java (all versions): CVE-2026-0994 is a Python-only vulnerability in the protobuf library's json_format.ParseDict() function — a recursion- depth counter bug in Python's json_format.py. The Java implementation does not contain that code. NVD assigns the cross-language CPE cpe:/a:google:protobuf to this CVE, which Dependency-Check then incorrectly matches against the Java protobuf-java artifact. Fix versions cited in the CVE (5.29.6, 6.33.5) are Python package versions.
This rule matches any protobuf-java JAR by filename (so it survives version bumps) and suppresses only CVE-2026-0994. Future Python-only or C++-only CVEs that NVD assigns to cpe:/a:google:protobuf on the Java artifact will need their own entries — we tried broader matchers (<packageUrl> and version-agnostic <cpe> in both CPE 2.2 and 2.3 forms) in earlier commits on the IGDD-2928 branch and verified in publish runs 26310238352 and 26316297788 that neither shape produces a match in this project's Dependency-Check configuration. Root cause: the workflows pass --disableCentral, so 44 of 134 scanned JARs (protobuf-java among them) have no PURL identifier, and the <cpe> matcher's containment semantics did not connect our value (in either CPE form) to the vulnerability identifiers Dependency-Check emits. The narrower filePath + CVE pattern is documented in the Dependency-Check suppression guide and is the form known to work here. Added: 2026-05-22
